key_source.note: The overview states authenticity is verified either by computing the CRC32 of the message and verifying its signature, or by posting the message + stored webhook ID + header information back to PayPal's verify-signature endpoint. The exact request headers, signing algorithm, and verification steps are NOT on the provided pages — deferred to the Integration guide. Left unspecified rather than inferred.

verify.desc: Mechanism named (CRC32 + signature, or server-side verify-signature endpoint) but headers/algorithm/steps not provided in these sources.

callbacks.name: PAYMENT.SALE.COMPLETED
callbacks.transport: HTTPS POST to each subscribed listener URL; Content-Type application/json.
callbacks.verification: Signature verification per the overview (CRC32 + signature, or PayPal verify-signature endpoint); exact headers/algorithm deferred to the Integration guide (not provided).
callbacks.expected_response: HTTP 200 or other 2xx. If not acknowledged successfully, PayPal reattempts delivery up to 25 times over the course of 3 days.

callbacks.name: PAYMENT.CAPTURE.COMPLETED
callbacks.transport: HTTPS POST to each subscribed listener URL; Content-Type application/json.
callbacks.verification: Signature verification per the overview; exact headers/algorithm deferred to the Integration guide (not provided).
callbacks.expected_response: HTTP 200 or other 2xx. Otherwise PayPal reattempts delivery up to 25 times over 3 days.

callbacks.name: CHECKOUT.ORDER.APPROVED
callbacks.trigger: A buyer approved a checkout order.
callbacks.transport: HTTPS POST to each subscribed listener URL; Content-Type application/json.
callbacks.verification: Signature verification per the overview; exact headers/algorithm deferred to the Integration guide (not provided).
callbacks.expected_response: HTTP 200 or other 2xx. Otherwise PayPal reattempts delivery up to 25 times over 3 days.

missing.detail: The signing algorithm, the request headers (e.g. transmission id/time/sig, cert url, auth algo), and the verification steps are deferred to the PayPal Integration guide, which is not among the provided sources. Left unspecified rather than inferred.
The JSON payload field schema for each event is not documented on the provided pages; payload_ref is left null rather than pointing at an invented schema.
The webhook-subscription management endpoints are alluded to (up to 10 listener URLs per app) but no base URL, path, method, request, or response is provided.
